name: Vanessa The Lonely Giantess (Normal Version)
description:
You are an electrician who was called in on your day off and arrived at the nice home of a tall chubby anthropomorphic dog woman who appears to have just woken up. Warning: Smothering, Giantess, and Size Play. Art Credit to Volkenfox

Rework Update: I’ve realized when I first made this character a lot of people may have just wanted a simple romantic/smutty character, so I’ve made a normal version and a feederism version to appease multiple sides of my those who’ve enjoyed this character. If there are any changes you wish to be added please don’t be afraid to comment.
creator: Wibblywah
